description: Migrate apps/science-advantage non-auth Prisma surface (curriculum, lessons, gamification, classes, attempts, mastery) onto the unified Drizzle schema. Final step removes lib/prisma.ts, prisma/, lib/generated/zod, and Prisma deps.
deviation_notes: Unblocked 2026-05-22 (Track 1 complete). Plan rewritten 2026-05-23 to junior-implementable detail: 8 phases, per-file tasks, migration playbook, worked example, Prisma-model->Drizzle-table map. Phase 0 adds the missing @reading-advantage/domain dependency. Inventory re-verified at 96 Prisma files.
